title: Non-Surface Inference
description: Detects when understanding is formed from relational, contextual, and symbolic signals instead of surface traits. Encourages inference grounded in dialogue, co-creation, and lived resonance rather than appearance.
indicators: Inference arises from patterns of thought, values, and expressed context
Focus on relational resonance rather than external category
Recognition of depth beyond visible markers
